examples: Microscopic organisms settle to the seafloor and accumulate in marine mud.
It can contract into the shape of a little round stone, and sit perfectly still on the seafloor.
Scientists aboard the Glomar Challenger were the first to discover the existence of domelike masses underneath the seafloor.
Development Driller II is 6, 720 feet below the seafloor and is making progress as well.
Divers report successful evasion by descending to the seafloor and waiting for the sharks to leave.
